child_branch_sums
examples.py:
def child_branch_sums(spec: dict) -> dict:
    """Map each direct child of base to the value sum of its subtree."""
    kids = spec["kids"]
    vals = spec["vals"]
    out = {}
    for ch in sorted(kids.get(spec["base"], [])):
        total = 0
        stack = [ch]
        while stack:
            cur = stack.pop()
            total += vals[cur]
            stack.extend(kids.get(cur, []))
        out[ch] = total
    return out

examples.name: arms_balanced
examples.py:
def arms_balanced(spec: dict) -> bool:
    """True when every direct child of base heads a subtree of the same node count."""
    kids = spec["kids"]
    sizes = []
    for ch in kids.get(spec["base"], []):
        n = 0
        stack = [ch]
        while stack:
            cur = stack.pop()
            n += 1
            stack.extend(kids.get(cur, []))
        sizes.append(n)
    return len(set(sizes)) <= 1

unique_dep_cost
examples.py:
def unique_dep_cost(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Total cost of base plus all transitive deps, each package counted once."""
    deps = spec["deps"]
    cost = spec["cost"]
    seen = set()
    stack = [spec["base"]]
    total = 0
    while stack:
        cur = stack.pop()
        if cur in seen:
            continue
        seen.add(cur)
        total += cost[cur]
        stack.extend(deps.get(cur, []))
    return total
